item.title: Testing netwok requests with URLProtocol stubs
item.description: Apple has a powerful URL Loading System which can be used in various ways with a bunch of most common URL schemes. It also includes the URLProtocol, a class that can intercept all network requests for different purposes. You can use it for analytics, testing, and even profiling your application.

item.title: Dependency Inversion Principle
item.description: The Dependency Inversion Principle is the last one from SOLID stands for decoupling the system into independent modules. It means that one part of a system should not depend on another one directly.
